heading: Assistance by other agencies
label: 2804 Assistance by other agencies

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary shall establish procedures to enter into memoranda of agreement for the use (with or without reimbursement) of the personnel or facilities of a Federal, tribal, State, or other government agency to aid in the enforcement or carrying out in Indian country of a law of either the United States or an Indian tribe that has authorized the Secretary to enforce tribal laws.July 29, 2010

children.heading: Certain activities
children.label: 2 Certain activities
children.text: The Secretary may authorize a law enforcement officer of such an agency to perform any activity the Secretary may authorize under .section 2803 of this title

children.heading: Training sessions in Indian country
children.label: A Training sessions in Indian country

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: The procedures described in paragraph (1) shall include the development of a plan to enhance the certification and provision of special law enforcement commissions to tribal law enforcement officials, and, subject to subsection (d), State and local law enforcement officials, pursuant to this section.

children.heading: Inclusions
children.label: ii Inclusions
children.text: The plan under clause (i) shall include the hosting of regional training sessions in Indian country, not less frequently than biannually, to educate and certify candidates for the special law enforcement commissions.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary, in consultation with Indian tribes and tribal law enforcement agencies, shall develop minimum requirements to be included in special law enforcement commission agreements pursuant to this section.July 29, 2010

children.heading: Substance of agreements
children.label: ii Substance of agreements
children.text: Each agreement entered into pursuant to this section shall reflect the status of the applicable certified individual as a Federal law enforcement officer under subsection (f), acting within the scope of the duties described in .section 2802(c) of this title

children.heading: Agreement
children.label: iii Agreement
children.text: Not later than 60 days after the date on which the Secretary determines that all applicable requirements under clause (i) are met, the Secretary shall offer to enter into a special law enforcement commission agreement with the Indian tribe.

children.heading: Agreement to be in accord with agreements between Secretary and Attorney General
children.label: b Agreement to be in accord with agreements between Secretary and Attorney General
children.text: Any agreement entered into under this section relating to the enforcement of the criminal laws of the United States shall be in accord with any agreement between the Secretary and the Attorney General of the United States.

children.heading: Limitations on use of personnel of non-Federal agency
children.label: c Limitations on use of personnel of non-Federal agency
children.text: The Secretary may not use the personnel of a non-Federal agency under this section in an area of Indian country if the Indian tribe having jurisdiction over such area of Indian country has adopted a resolution objecting to the use of the personnel of such agency. The Secretary shall consult with Indian tribes before entering into any agreement under subsection (a) with a non-Federal agency that will provide personnel for use in any area under the jurisdiction of such Indian tribes.

children.heading: Authority of Federal agency head to enter into agreement with Secretary
children.label: d Authority of Federal agency head to enter into agreement with Secretary
children.text: Notwithstanding the provisions of , the head of a Federal agency with law enforcement personnel or facilities may enter into an agreement (with or without reimbursement) with the Secretary under subsection (a).section 1535 of title 31

children.heading: Authority of Federal agency head to enter into agreement with Indian tribe
children.label: e Authority of Federal agency head to enter into agreement with Indian tribe

children.text: the law enforcement authority of the Indian tribe, or
the carrying out of a law of either the United States or the Indian tribe.

children.heading: Status of person as Federal employee
children.label: f Status of person as Federal employee
A
children.text: the provisions of law described in , andsection 3374(c)(2) of title 5
an eligible officer under subchapter III of chapter 81 of title 5.
a Federal, tribal, State, or other government agency; or
the Indian Law Enforcement Foundation established under section 5412(a) of this title.1See References in Text note below.1
